chunks.title: Israelites in Egypt
chunks.reason: Lists the sons of Jacob and notes their growth in number.

chunks.title: Oppression by Pharaoh
chunks.reason: Describes the new king's rise and the harsh labor imposed on Israel.

chunks.title: The Hebrew Midwives
chunks.reason: Records the interaction between Pharaoh and the midwives regarding the newborn boys.

chunks.title: Pharaoh's Decree
chunks.reason: States the final command to cast all Hebrew sons into the Nile.
